name: GOLFi Indoor Golf Center
address: 22601 La Palma Ave #107, Yorba Linda, CA 92887
about: GOLFi Indoor Golf Center is a high-tech indoor golf venue located in Yorba Linda, California. The facility uses an American-made 3 Trak launch monitor system with high-speed cameras to capture shot data with over 98% accuracy. Players have access to over 119 world-class golf courses and can engage in various game modes, from realistic rounds to entertainment options like poker and skee ball. The center offers a mix of individual practice, group play, and professional training programs, with sessions typically lasting between one to one and a half hours for a full round.
why_golfers_like_it: High-precision 3 Trak launch monitor with 98% accuracy
Access to over 119 premium golf courses
On-site PGA-level coaching with 10-30 years of experience
Variety of entertainment games beyond traditional golf

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen mentioned, outside food policy not specified
No bar mentioned, no alcohol references on website

simulator_hardware.notes: American-made with high-speed cameras capturing 3D vector, spin, speed, and angles

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Players are recommended to bring their own golf clubs for a better experience, but GOLFi provides equipment for free. A repair fee will be required for any damage to their equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks, nor does it mention an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round of 18 holes typically takes between one hour and one and a half hours, depending on the course and players' skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFi offers junior tournament training, registration, and on-site technical coaching, making it suitable for young golfers.
